item.title: Geoguessr
item.description: ⚠️ This guide was originally written in DITA, then transformed to Markdown through the DITA Open Toolkit. As a result, it may contain errors.It is accurate as of February 2022.Thank you for your understanding. Introduction # Welcome to How to master Geoguessr –or where the heck am I?! Geoguessr logo Through this hopefully thorough guide, we wish to introduce you to a wonderful game called Geoguessr. May this lecture help you master it.
